input_roles.edit_target_image: Provides composition, pose/action relation, costume/scene relationship, camera and lighting.
input_roles.character_reference_image: Provides and locks the original reference character appearance, makeup, identity, face, hair, body temperament and necessary costume features.

preserve_scope: costume if user says to preserve it
change_scope: replace target character identity with character_reference_image while preserving the original reference character appearance and makeup unchanged
fit new identity naturally into action, costume/prop relationship, perspective and lighting
critical_requirements: Fully restore original character appearance, makeup, face, hair, skin texture, body proportion and temperament from character_reference_image.
Do not alter non-target characters, background or composition.
Do not add new story, props or scene elements.
negative_constraints: do not change non-target characters, background or composition
no altered makeup or changed reference character appearance
no new story, props or scene elements

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Preserve composition, camera, action relation, scene and lighting from edit_target_image, and replace the target character with the identity from character_reference_image while preserving the original reference character appearance and makeup unchanged. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.

review_focus: original reference character appearance and makeup unchanged
